---
title: "Scan Artifact Redaction Policy for Multi-Agency Distribution"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Record · ADR-045 · PROPOSED"
date: 2026-04-23
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture Decision Record

**ADR-045** — status: **PROPOSED** — decided: **2026-04-23**

This page renders the canonical ADR source verbatim. The authoritative
source is at [`src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-045-scan-redaction-policy.md`](../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-045-scan-redaction-policy.md).
Any change to this ADR's content happens in the source file; this
wrapper is regenerated by `scripts/generate_adr_qmd_wrappers.py` per
[ADR-068](adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-045-scan-redaction-policy.md >}}
